sections.paragraph:
Original: טלאים

Transliteration: ṭelâ'ı̂ym

Phonetic: tel-aw-eem'

BDB Definition:

Telaim = "lambs"
  1. a place in Judah where Saul mustered his forces before attacking Amalek; site unknown

Origin: from the pl. of H2922

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
